channel.title: Posts on John Ilee
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on John Ilee

item.title: PHY 3281: Star & Planet Formation
item.description: University of Leeds Autumn 2018 Discussion 1: Bok Globules [Minerva] Workshop 1 [Minerva] Discussion 2: The Initial Mass Function [Minerva] Workshop 2 [Minerva] Discussion 3: Massive Star Formation [Minerva] Workshop 3 [Minerva]

item.title: AS 5002: Magnetofluids & Space Plasmas
item.description: University of St Andrews Autumn 2015 Molecular clouds & the virial theorem [Moodle] The Jeans length & mass [Moodle] Magnetic support mechanisms [Moodle] Cloud contraction & fragmentation [Moodle] The angular momentum problem [Moodle] Young stellar objects, T Tauri stars & discs [Moodle]
